summary: Unknown source recording with a mixed first set, but great Help>Slip>Franklin's, Estimated Prophet and Terrapin Station lift the show.
review: The review gives no details on the recording source, so its technical quality remains uncertain. Musically the first set is called sloppy, yet it contains standout moments – a smoking Help > Slipknot! > Franklin's sequence, an inspired Estimated Prophet, and a soaring Terrapin Station that redeem the performance. Overall the show earns a solid 4‑star rating despite the uneven start.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed 4‑star review; strong song highlights offset a sloppy first set, but no recording info limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound quality or source type; cannot assess clarity or mix.
